bio.title: Software Engineer with roots in traditional engineering and a focus on high-impact solutions.
bio.p1: My journey began in Engineering, where for 5 years I developed the analytical rigor that I apply to software development today. I discovered my true vocation at the intersection of technical precision and digital creation.
bio.p2: Currently, I work as a Software Engineer at <1>Pressure Systems International</1>, focusing on mobile development with React Native, SwiftUI and Kotlin, in addition to full-stack solutions with Java/Spring Boot and cloud architectures (AWS/Azure).
bio.p3: Whether leading aeroelasticity systems in the Avoante Aeromec project or integrating hardware and firmware at EMBRAPII, my commitment is to consistency, continuous learning, and technical excellence.

exp.title: Professional Trajectory: From Critical Systems to High-Performance Mobile.
exp.psi_desc: Technical leadership in Mobile development (React Native, SwiftUI, Kotlin) and Full-stack (Java/Spring Boot). Focus on CarPlay/Android Auto integration and scalable cloud architectures.
exp.duko_desc: Technical strategist in Salesforce and Azure Cloud ecosystems, developing automation and growth marketing solutions with JS/TS.
exp.embrapii_desc: Development of distributed systems and IoT for real-time solar plant monitoring. Specialist in wireless communication via brokers (MQTT/AMQP).
exp.freelance_desc: Development of customized solutions in React, React Native, Node.js, and Python, with a focus on scalable architectures.

mobile.title: Mobile Specialist: Building Bridges between Native and Hybrid.
mobile.p1: My expertise in Mobile lies in the ability to extract maximum performance from frameworks like <0>React Native</0> while integrating advanced native features in <0>SwiftUI</0> and <0>Kotlin</0>.
mobile.p2: I have robust experience in industrial implementations, such as full integration with <0>CarPlay</0> and <0>Android Auto</0>, ensuring a continuous user experience in fleet and logistics environments.
mobile.p3: Full mastery of the <0>Expo</0> and <0>Metro Bundler</0> ecosystem for agile and consistent deliveries in global environments.

web.title: Web Architecture: Scalable, Resilient, and Modern Systems.
web.p1: I develop robust systems using <0>Java with Spring Boot</0> and <0>TypeScript with React/Next.js</0>. My approach prioritizes security, horizontal scalability, and real-time monitoring.
web.p2: Deep experience in container orchestration with <0>Docker and Kubernetes</0> (EKS/AKS), in addition to complex data management with PostgreSQL, MongoDB, and Redis.
web.p3: Implementation of resilient microservices using asynchronous messaging for systems that cannot fail.

embedded.title: Embedded Systems & Hardware: Where Code meets the Physical.
embedded.p1: Through EMBRAPII, I developed embedded algorithms in <0>C++</0> for solar plants, dealing with industrial communication protocols and direct integration between software and sensors.
embedded.p2: My background in aeroelastic research (Avoante Aeromec) allowed me to master complex simulations and scientific data processing in <0>Python</0>.
embedded.p3: I am a professional who transitions fluidly between bare-metal and high-level applications, always maintaining the rigor founded in engineering.

welcome.time_outro: to study, right? Keep an eye on the news.
welcome.p1: Welcome to my humble virtual home, where I leave all my developments as a programmer, from portfolio entries to scientific articles in various fields. Programming, mathematics, physics, tips I can offer, even aeronautics insights.
welcome.p2: Here you can also organize your study hours with fast study methodologies like pomodoro, listing categories, and more. Check it out, colleague!

projects.title: <Projects />
projects.bio: Welcome to Indigo's project and development area. Here you will find a collection of my creative experiments and MVP products, demonstrating the evolution of my stacks and modern interface proposals.

mobile.title: React Native: The Future is Mobile

clean_code.title: Clean Code, just like you
clean_code.desc: Why are we talking so much about Clean Code and why is it so important? In fact, software maintenance is as important as its initial construction.

footer.description: Developed with technical precision and a passion for excellence.
